search.empty.typeToSearch.en: Type to search apps, commands, and modules
search.empty.typeToSearch.zh-Hans: 输入以搜索应用、命令和模块

search.empty.help.en: Type help <command> for help (e.g. help clip). clip ? also works.
search.empty.help.zh-Hans: 输入 help <命令> 查看帮助（如 help clip）。也可使用 clip ?

search.empty.noItemsInSection.en: No items in %@. Add data or try a more specific query.
search.empty.noItemsInSection.zh-Hans: %@ 中暂无内容。请添加数据或缩小查询范围。

search.empty.noMatchesInSection.en: No matches in %@ for “%@”. Check spelling or module settings.
search.empty.noMatchesInSection.zh-Hans: 在 %@ 中未找到 “%@”。请检查拼写或模块设置。

search.empty.unknownHelp.en: Unknown command “%@”. Try help %@ or type ? for all commands.
search.empty.unknownHelp.zh-Hans: 未知命令 “%@”。试试 help %@ 或输入 ? 查看全部命令。

search.empty.globalMinChars.en: Type at least 2 characters for global search, or use a command prefix (clip, note, t).
search.empty.globalMinChars.zh-Hans: 全局搜索至少输入 2 个字符，或使用命令前缀（clip、note、t）。

search.empty.globalNoMatches.en: No matches for “%@”. Enable modules in Settings or try a command prefix.
search.empty.globalNoMatches.zh-Hans: 未找到 “%@”。请在设置中启用模块或尝试命令前缀。

search.empty.suggestion.en: Select a suggestion or press Return

search.placeholder.cheatSheet.en: Search apps, paste, translate, todo, aw…
search.placeholder.cheatSheet.zh-Hans: 搜索应用、剪贴板、翻译、待办、aw…

status.draftQuicklinks.zh-Hans: 草稿已加载到快捷链接

status.quicklinkTriggerTaken.en: Trigger already in use — pick another

status.quicklinkMissingProtocol.zh-Hans: 链接需要 http:// 或 https://

status.snippetTriggerTaken.en: Trigger already in use — pick another

status.noAlternateActions.en: No alternate actions for this item

status.noActionPanelActions.en: No extra actions — press Return to open
status.noActionPanelActions.zh-Hans: 无额外操作 — 按 Return 打开

status.replaceSelectionDone.zh-Hans: 已替换前台应用中的选中文本

status.replaceSelectionFailed.zh-Hans: 无法替换选中文本 — 请授予辅助功能权限

setup.accessibility.subtitle.en: Open Settings → Accessibility, then enable Luma
setup.accessibility.subtitle.zh-Hans: 打开设置 → 辅助功能，然后启用 Luma

setup.notes.subtitle.en: Choose where your markdown library lives
setup.notes.subtitle.zh-Hans: 选择 Markdown 笔记库位置

setup.modules.subtitle.en: Enable default-off modules (Records, Browser Tabs, Auto Workflow)
setup.modules.subtitle.zh-Hans: 启用默认关闭的模块（记录、浏览器标签、自动工作流）

onboarding.step.welcome.body.en: Press ⌘Space to open Luma from anywhere. Type a command or search globally.
onboarding.step.welcome.body.zh-Hans: 随时按 ⌘Space 打开 Luma。输入命令或全局搜索。

onboarding.step.hotkey.body.en: Default hotkey is ⌘Space. If Spotlight conflicts, disable its shortcut in Keyboard Settings.
onboarding.step.hotkey.body.zh-Hans: 默认快捷键为 ⌘Space。若与 Spotlight 冲突，请在键盘设置中关闭 Spotlight 快捷键。

onboarding.step.accessibility.body.en: Grant Accessibility for window focus, snippet paste, and Translate replace-selection.
onboarding.step.accessibility.body.zh-Hans: 授予辅助功能权限以支持窗口聚焦、片段粘贴和翻译替换选中文本。

onboarding.step.modules.body.en: Enable Records, Browser Tabs, Auto Workflow, and Commands in Settings → Modules.
onboarding.step.modules.body.zh-Hans: 在 设置 → 模块 中启用记录、浏览器标签、自动工作流和命令模块。

onboarding.step.help.body.en: Type help clip, help tr, or clip ? for module help. Home shows setup suggestions.
onboarding.step.help.body.zh-Hans: 输入 help clip、help tr 或 clip ? 查看模块帮助。主页会显示设置建议。

onboarding.step.done.body.en: Open the launcher and try clip, tr hello, or todo.
onboarding.step.done.body.zh-Hans: 打开启动器，试试 clip、tr hello 或 todo。

onboarding.homeRow.subtitle.en: Walk through permissions, modules, and commands
onboarding.homeRow.subtitle.zh-Hans: 引导完成权限、模块和命令设置

translate.detail.placeholder.zh-Hans: 在 %@ 中 — Esc 返回

hint.detail.back.zh-Hans: Esc 返回    ⌘W 关闭详情
